MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Austin Beardsley of The Ryan Firm (714-666-1362) CourtCall appearing for defendant Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems moving party.

Tentative ruling is adopted, Defendant Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc.'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Recorded On December 13, 2012, As Instrument No. 2010-J103771-00 In The County Of San Francisco And Request For Attorney'S Fees And Costs Against Plaintiff.
